page_content: Schedule of Classes available February 21 Registration appointment and blocks available at app.testudo.umd.edu/main/regAppt March 7 Priority registration and graduate student registration begins March 27 Early registration: Currently enrolled students can register on their scheduled day and time. March 31 - May 8 General registration: Returning students may make changes to their schedule by adding and dropping classes; no appointment required. New students will register at their orientation. May 9 - September 1 Last day to cancel registration with 100% refund September 1 Late registration begins: All students initiating registration for the semester on or after the first day of classes will be assessed a $20 late registration fee. September 2 Schedule Adjustment Period: Students can add and drop classes, change credit level, or grading September 2 - method; no appointment required. September 15 Mandatory waitlist check-in period: Students are required to check-in every business day to September 2 - remain on the waitlist. September 16 Last day to drop a course with 100% refund for graduate students, part-time undergraduate students and undergraduate students changing from full-time to part-time who want to drop a September 8 course while remaining registered in one or more courses. Last day to apply for graduation September 15 Last day to drop a course with an 80% refund for graduate students, part-time undergraduate students and undergraduate students changing from full-time to part-time who want to drop a September 15 course while remaining registered in one or more courses. Last day to withdraw from all courses with 80% refund September 15 Last day to withdraw from all courses with 60% refund September 22 Last day to withdraw from all courses with 40% refund September 29 Last day to withdraw from all courses with 20% refund October 6 Last day to drop a course with a W (undergraduate students only) November 12 Graduate student registration deadlines: Last day for graduate students to drop a course, change course credit level, or change grading method November 12 September 19 October 10 October 30 November 3 - December 11 December 11 - January 25 February 1, 2026 January 26 January 26 - February 13 February 2 - February 16 February 6 February 13 February 13 February 13 February 20 February 27 March 6 April 10 April 10
